$comment: DataCite Metadata Schema 4.4 (JSON representation). Machine-readable counterpart of Record 3 in ../METADATA.md. Identifier is a real Zenodo Sandbox DOI, reserved (not published) 2026-07-13 per ROADMAP.md Phase 9.2 — it does not resolve on real doi.org.

titles.title: NYC 311 & Weather (2025) — Daily Request Counts by Category, Joined with Weather

publisher: Zenodo Sandbox (test deposit — not a real/published record)

geoLocations.geoLocationPlace: New York City, USA (citywide; single weather station — see Representativeness in ../QUALITY_FINDINGS.md)

rightsList.rights: Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International — a scholarly-norm choice made freely, not one the inbound sources required (both are CC0-equivalent, see record_311.json / record_weather.json).

descriptions.description: 1,143 rows, one per (date, complaint category); n_requests sums to the full cleaned 311 event count. See ../data_dictionary_analysis_daily.md for the full column-level schema.

relatedIdentifiers.$comment: The companion software deposit (record_software.json) that generated this dataset.
